ddls:
CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the design was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the design was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the design */,
  "tags" TEXT /* List of tags or keywords associated with the design */,
  "created_by_team" INTEGER /* ID of the team that created the design */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "instance_count" INTEGER /* Number of instances of the module in the design */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of the module */,
  "input_ports" INTEGER /* Number of input ports in the module */,
  "output_ports" INTEGER /* Number of output ports in the module */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependent modules required by this module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the process belongs to */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "instance_count" INTEGER /* Number of instances of the process in the design */,
  "process_type" TEXT /* Type of the process */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* List of parameters required by the process */,
  "outputs" TEXT /* List of output files or results generated by the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synthesis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synthesis result */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the result belongs to */,
  "generated_code" INTEGER /* Size of the generated code in lines of code (LoC) */,
  "compilation_time" REAL /* Compilation time in seconds */,
  "netlist" TEXT /* Generated netlist file */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* List of constraints applied during synthesis */,
  "warnings" TEXT /* List of warnings generated during synthesis */,
  "errors" TEXT /* List of errors encountered during synthesis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synthesis_results_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the design */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Comment or description for the version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "parent_module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent module (if any) */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the module in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_hierarchy_parent_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_hierarchy_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process (if any) */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the process in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_hierarchy_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_hierarchy_parent_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the collaboration */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the user in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., design updated, new version available) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Actual notification message sent to the user */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)
